name: Outro
_source: s;{v:JagenName};Ah, {e:v('LordPronouns')['Address1C']} {v:LordName}{tgm}...|{tgm}I apologize. I'm afraid I may have underestimated the enemy.
s;{v:LordName};I'll have the clerics tend to you right away. You can still--
s;{v:JagenName};It is too late for me, {e:v('LordPronouns')['Address']}. I{tgm}...{tgm} am not long for this world{tgm}...
s;{v:LordName};No, you can't say such things!|Get up, {e:v('JagenPronouns')['Address1C']} {v:JagenName}, please{tgm}...!|{tgm}You said we would defeat the calamity together{tgm}...!

s;{v:JagenName};You have grown so much in a year, {e:v('LordPronouns')['Address']}.|I only wish I was able to see how much further you'll go.|Go on without me, {e:v('LordProunouns')['Address']}{tgm}...
s;Player;Congratulations, {e:v('LordPronouns')['Address']}. You saved the town from destruction!
s;Lord;It wasn't just me. Your guidance led us to victory today as well, {e:v('JagenPronouns')['Address1C']} {v:JagenName}.|My father had the right idea having you be my tactician.
s;{v:LordName};I hope we continue to do good work together.
s;{v:JagenName};I'm sure we will, {e:v('LordPronouns')['Address']}. It's just as I said.|We will take on any calamity that befalls us.
s;;And so the curtain falls on the first act of {v:LordName} and {v:JagenName}'s story.;;;hint
s;;Poor, poor {v:JagenName}. I had so much faith in you. Perhaps your death was destined too.;;140;hint
s;;But who am I to say? It's not as if I determine these things.;;;hint;NumLines=3
s;;What? You think I am responsible for these events? Oh, no, no, no.;;130;hint;NumLines=3
s;;A victory earned, but predetermined. I've said as much when you started, {v:JagenName};;;hint
s;;Although, there are other paths time could have taken. I'll say that much.;;;hint
s;;Hm? "What do I mean by that"?;;;hint;NumLines=2
s;;Time isn't as concrete as you may think, {v:JagenName}.;;;hint;NumLines=3
s;;But that is a discussion for another day.;;;hint;NumLines=2
s;;At any rate, you and {v:LordName} had a grand time together, wouldn't you say?;;;hint
s;;A year of learning, adversity, and camaraderie...;;110;hint;NumLines=3
s;;Perhaps that's all that mattered in the end.;;130;hint;NumLines=2
s;;No matter the result, you did your best within the time given to you.;;;hint;NumLines=3
s;;Did you learn anything? What would you have done differently?;;;hint;NumLines=3
s;;I'll let you mull over that yourself.|For now, this is goodbye.;;130;hint;NumLines=3
